title: Accurate Food Expansion
description:
This mod adds food that TECHNICALLY could be added to Vanilla Minecraft with all of it's logic.
All the food statistics have been mathematically calculated to be logically accurate to the vanilla game.
body:
# About the mod
The mod currently adds a total of **33** food items and **1** achievement.
All the foods have mathematically calculated food and saturation values that are connected to Vanilla.
## Additions
# - Added Foods:
- Poisonous Apple
- Poisonous Golden Apple
- Enchanted Poisonous Golden Apple
- Cooked Glow Ink Sac
- Cooked Ink Sac
- Cooked Pufferfish
- Cooked Rotten Flesh
- Cooked Tropical Fish
- Golden Potato
- Golden Poisonous Potato
- Enchanted Golden Potato
- Enchanted Golden Poisonous Potato
- Baked Poisonous Potato
- Baked Golden Poisonous Potato
- Enchanted Baked Golden Potato
- Enchanted Baked Golden Poisonous Potato
- Enchanted Golden Carrot
- Poisonous Carrot
- Poisonous Golden Carrot
- Enchanted Poisonous Golden Carrot
- Golden Beetroot
- Golden Poisonous Beetroot
- Poisonous Beetroot
- Enchanted Golden Beetroot
- Enchanted Golden Poisonous Beetroot
- Golden Beetroot Soup
- Golden Poisonous Beetroot Soup
- Poisonous Beetroot Soup
- Enchanted Golden Beetroot Soup
- Enchanted Golden Poisonous Beetroot Soup
# Added Achievements:
- Snow White
**The Enchanted Golden items are currently impossible to get, I will fix that in the future.**
**The Poisonous Items don't drop from crops, I will fix that in the future.**
# About 67% of what I plan to do is completed.
